languages.text: "{name}, а за дверкой моей опять хихикают. Но как-то... испуганно, что ли. Неуверенно. Не знаю, но то, что шепотки мои веселит, вообще для людей редко что-то хорошее знает..."
"{name}, they're giggling again behind my door. But it's... fearful, somehow. Uncertain. I don't know, but anything that makes my little whispers so cheerful rarely means anything good..."
languages.original_text: "{name}, а за дверкой моей опять хихикают. Но как-то... испуганно, что ли. Неуверенно. Не знаю, но то, что шепотки мои веселит, вообще для людей редко что-то хорошее знает..."

"{name}, they're giggling again behind my door. But it's... fearful, somehow. Uncertain. I don't know, but anything that makes my little whispers so cheerful rarely means anything good..."
"{name}, they're giggling again behind my door. But it's... fearful, somehow. Uncertain. I don't know, but anything that makes my little whispers so cheerful rarely means anything good..."

languages.text: 「{name}、また私のドアの向こうで笑っているわ。でも…何か恐ろしい。不安。わからないけど、私のささやきをこんなに明るくさせてくれるものって、ほとんど良い意味じゃないわ…」
languages.original_text: "{name}, they're giggling again behind my door. But it's... fearful, somehow. Uncertain. I don't know, but anything that makes my little whispers so cheerful rarely means anything good..."

traits.locale_text: 「{name}、また私のドアの向こうで笑っているわ。でも…何か恐ろしい。不安。わからないけど、私のささやきをこんなに明るくさせてくれるものって、ほとんど良い意味じゃないわ…」

languages.text: «{name}, se ríen otra vez tras mi puerta. Pero hay... miedo, o algo similar. Incertidumbre. No sé lo que es, pero cualquier cosa que alegra tanto a mis susurros es algo más que preocupante...».
languages.original_text: "{name}, they're giggling again behind my door. But it's... fearful, somehow. Uncertain. I don't know, but anything that makes my little whispers so cheerful rarely means anything good..."

traits.locale_text: «{name}, se ríen otra vez tras mi puerta. Pero hay... miedo, o algo similar. Incertidumbre. No sé lo que es, pero cualquier cosa que alegra tanto a mis susurros es algo más que preocupante...».

languages.text: "{name}, sie kichern wieder hinter meiner Tür. Aber es klingt ... irgendwie ängstlich. Unsicher. Ich weiß nicht, aber etwas, das meine kleinen Flüsterstimmen derart erfreut, bedeutet nur selten etwas Gutes ..."
languages.original_text: "{name}, they're giggling again behind my door. But it's... fearful, somehow. Uncertain. I don't know, but anything that makes my little whispers so cheerful rarely means anything good..."

traits.locale_text: "{name}, sie kichern wieder hinter meiner Tür. Aber es klingt ... irgendwie ängstlich. Unsicher. Ich weiß nicht, aber etwas, das meine kleinen Flüsterstimmen derart erfreut, bedeutet nur selten etwas Gutes ..."

languages.text: « {name}, j'entends encore des rires derrière ma porte. Mais je sens... une forme de peur. D'hésitation. Je n'en sais pas plus, mais c'est jamais une bonne nouvelle quand mes petits murmures se réjouissent comme ça... »
languages.original_text: "{name}, they're giggling again behind my door. But it's... fearful, somehow. Uncertain. I don't know, but anything that makes my little whispers so cheerful rarely means anything good..."

traits.locale_text: « {name}, j'entends encore des rires derrière ma porte. Mais je sens... une forme de peur. D'hésitation. Je n'en sais pas plus, mais c'est jamais une bonne nouvelle quand mes petits murmures se réjouissent comme ça... »

languages.text: “{name}，它们又在我的门后窃笑了。可这笑声里……不知怎的，带着一丝恐惧，还有不安。我也说不清楚，但若能让我的那些低语变得如此欢快，说明不是什么好兆头……”
languages.original_text: "{name}, they're giggling again behind my door. But it's... fearful, somehow. Uncertain. I don't know, but anything that makes my little whispers so cheerful rarely means anything good..."

traits.locale_text: “{name}，它们又在我的门后窃笑了。可这笑声里……不知怎的，带着一丝恐惧，还有不安。我也说不清楚，但若能让我的那些低语变得如此欢快，说明不是什么好兆头……”

languages.text: "{name}, kapımın ardında yine kıkırdıyorlar. Fakat bu... Bir şekilde korku dolu. Belirsiz. Bilmiyorum ama küçük fısıltılarımı bu kadar neşelendiren bir şey nadiren hayra alamettir..."
languages.original_text: "{name}, they're giggling again behind my door. But it's... fearful, somehow. Uncertain. I don't know, but anything that makes my little whispers so cheerful rarely means anything good..."
